scenario_content:
[Issue Title]: New group is empty after I joined, no interaction possible

[Post 1]:
I have:

 searched open and closed issues for duplicates
 read https://github.com/WhisperSystems/Signal-Android/wiki/Submitting-useful-bug-reports


Bug description
It seems like someone added me to a push group. I just got two messages. That's the only interaction I had with this group. I cannot send texts because the input panel is not responsive. I can't even type anything.
Steps that happened

I am not part of this group.
I get two group messages in this group from the same person, presumably the creator

Actual result: Member list is empty, name is "Unbenannte Gruppe" (german for unnamed group), nothing happens when tapping on the input panel.
Expected result: Member list has entries, I can send texts to the group.
Device info

Device: Fairphone 2
Android version: 6.0.1
Signal version: 4.11.5
Link to debug log
I received the two mentioned group messages some minutes before taking this log
https://gist.github.com/4f7a2b47c2a40e771e5cbd4a06f78c58

[Post 2]:
I had the same issue a while back that I forgot to report.
My friend messaged me on Signal after a long while (some reinstalls might have happened). The conversation is titled "Unnamed group" and the Group Members list is empty.
I cannot reply on Android but I can do so on Desktop. Messages sent from desktop are visible on Android. Desktop also shows an empty "Group Members" list.
Timestamp says Oct 13, so that should help narrow down which version.
Here's a log captured after I tried to reply on Android: https://gist.github.com/anonymous/6c74e595a942dd69d1bca85114fad0d8
@FeuRenard Can you check whether

that you can reply using Desktop
that it is actually a group and not a conversation with a single person. I'm pretty sure that mine is a single person conversation

[Post 3]:
Update:
The issue was fixed by the next message from the group creator. You can see in the screenshot that the group creation info message comes after four messages (three from group creator F, one from me).

I took this log directly after receiving the "repair" message:
https://gist.github.com/a5a3d6057641b4c5d9601ee2f02b8577
@dcherian

I can write and send a message on Signal Desktop and it is synced to my phone. It seems like the group creator got the message because he answered.
I suppose it's a group because of the message content.

[Post 4]:
I just discovered in the single conversation with the group creator that a safety number change was noticed yesterday. The group creation was the first interaction with this contact after a long time. So the creation message might have been the first message with this new safety number.
Maybe this information can help with reproducing this issue.

[Post 5]:
"The group creation was the first interaction with this contact after a long time. "
Same was true for my contact.

[Post 6]:
Possible workaround: ask a group member to edit the group details. This will cause an update of the group, which might resolve your issue.

[Post 7]:
GitHub Issue Cleanup:
See #7598 for more information.
system_prompt:
你是一位经验丰富的软件工程师和项目管理者，专注于软件系统中的价值风险分析。
你的任务是分析给定的GitHub Issue讨论内容，识别其中涉及的人类价值关切。

价值风险是指软件系统可能对用户或利益相关者的重要价值（如隐私、安全、公平性、可用性等）产生负面影响的潜在问题。
Issue讨论中可能包含用户对软件行为的不满、功能请求、Bug报告等，这些内容可能隐含对某些价值的关切。
user_prompt:
## 价值场景（Issue讨论）
[Issue Title]: New group is empty after I joined, no interaction possible

[Post 1]:
I have:

 searched open and closed issues for duplicates

Expected result: Member list has entries, I can send texts to the group.

https://gist.github.com/4f7a2b47c2a40e771e5cbd4a06f78c58

that you can reply using Desktop
that it is actually a group and not a conversation with a single person. I'm pretty sure that mine is a single person conversation

Update:
The issue was fixed by the next message from the group creator. You can see in the screenshot that the group creation info message comes after four messages (three from group creator F, one from me).

[Post 4]:
I just discovered in the single conversation with the group creator that a safety number change was noticed yesterday. The group creation was the first interaction with this contact after a long time. So the creation message might have been the first message with this new safety number.

[Post 7]:
GitHub Issue Cleanup:
See #7598 for more information.



## 价值模型参考
以下是可能涉及的价值类型及其定义：
### 人类价值主题 (L2)
- **HV1 (Conformity)**: Adhering to rules, regulations, guidelines, or commonly accepted standards during application use or development.
- **HV2 (Pleasure)**: Providing enjoyment and satisfaction to users when using the application.
- **HV3 (Dignity)**: Maintaining users’ sense of dignity, respect, and personal worth when interacting with the application.
- **HV4 (Inclusiveness)**: Enabling people from different backgrounds, languages, cultures, or knowledge levels to use the application.
- **HV5 (Sense_of_Belonging)**: Supporting users’ feeling of being connected to a group or community through the application.
- **HV6 (Freedom)**: Providing users with options and choices, and avoiding forced dependencies on specific services or workflows.
- **HV7 (Independence)**: Reducing dependency on third-party services or external systems.
- **HV8 (Wealth)**: Considering the monetary or economic cost associated with using the application.
- **HV9 (Privacy)**: Protecting users’ personal information and addressing concerns about data collection or tracking.
- **HV10 (Security)**: Protecting users from external threats or attacks when using the application.

### 系统价值主题 (L3)
- **SV1 (Trust)**: Compelling users to believe that an application is harmless.
- **SV2 (Correctness)**: Ensuring that the application provides expected information and behavior.
- **SV3 (Compatibility)**: Supporting a range of user devices and operating systems.
- **SV4 (Portability)**: Allowing the application to be migrated to other devices.
- **SV5 (Reliability)**: Reducing the occurrence of application failures.
- **SV6 (Efficiency)**: Reducing the time and effort required to perform tasks within the application.
- **SV7 (Energy_Preservation)**: Reducing power or energy consumption during application use.
- **SV8 (Usability)**: Improving the ease of use of the application.
- **SV9 (Accessibility)**: Improving access to information or functionality, particularly for users with special needs.
- **SV10 (Longevity)**: Ensuring prolonged availability of the application in the future.

## 任务
请你以一个软件工程师和项目管理者的视角，回答以下两个问题：

（1）上述Issue讨论是否涉及价值风险？请回答"是"或"否"。

（2）如果涉及价值风险，可能涉及哪些价值风险？请从上述价值模型中选择相关的价值类型，并说明原因。

## 输出格式
请严格按照以下JSON格式输出：
```json
{
  "has_value_risk": true/false,
  "identified_values": [
    {
      "value_id": "价值ID（如HV1, SV1等）",
      "value_name": "价值名称",
      "confidence": 0.0-1.0之间的置信度,
      "reasoning": "识别该价值风险的理由"
    }
  ],
  "overall_analysis": "整体分析说明"
}
```
